title: Smallest Good Base
hints: The smallest base corresponds to the longest sequence of ones, so iterate possible lengths from max down to 2.
For a fixed length L, the base k is roughly n^(1/(L-1)). Use binary search or integer root to find exact k.
Check if the candidate k actually produces n when expanded as 1 + k + ... + k^(L-1). Return the first valid k found.
